zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Salkeld於1340年出生時，他的父親Richard Salkeld78歲，母親Matilda Crofton63歲。他於1362年與Christiana Rosgill在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1388年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1379年4月在英國波藍德阿丁加姆享年39歲，埋葬在英國波藍德阿丁加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Salkeld于1340年出生时，他的父亲Richard Salkeld78岁，母亲Matilda Crofton63岁。他于1362年与Christiana Rosgill在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1388年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1379年4月在英国波藍德阿丁加姆享年39岁，埋葬在英国波藍德阿丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Salkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Salkeld (Cumberland), probably from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + hylte ‘wood’, though the final element may have been confused with Old Norse kelda ‘spring, marshy place’. Alternatively, the final element may be an Old English hilde, a variant of helde ‘slope’. This surname has been present (though never common) in Ireland for centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Salkeld was born in 1340, his father, Richard Salkeld, was 78 and his mother, Matilda Crofton, was 63. He married Christiana Rosgill in 1362, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1388, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died in April 1379, in Addingham, Cumberland, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Addingham, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Salkeld est né en 1340, son père, Richard Salkeld, avait 78 ans et sa mère, Matilda Crofton, avait 63 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Rosgill en 1362, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1388, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé en avril 1379, à Addingham, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Addingham, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Salkeld 1340 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Salkeld 78 und seine Mutter Matilda Crofton 63. Er hat 1362 in Westmorland, England Christiana Rosgill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1388 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb im April 1379 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Addingham, Cumberland, England und wurde in Addingham, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Salkeld è nato il nel 1340, il suo padre, Richard Salkeld, aveva 78 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Crofton, aveva 63 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Rosgill nel 1362, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1388, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì nel aprile 1379, nel Addingham, Cumberland, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Addingham, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Salkeldが1340年に生まれた時，父Richard Salkeldは78歳，母Matilda Croftonは63歳であった。1362年にイギリスウエストモーランドでChristiana Rosgillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1388年，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1379年4月にイギリスクウンバーランドアッドインガムで39歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドアッドインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Salkeld(이)가 1340년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Salkeld(은)는 78세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Crofton(은)는 63세였다. 그는 1362년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Christiana Rosgill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1388년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1379년 4월 영국 c벌랜드 애딩함에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드 애딩함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Salkeld nasceu em 1340, seu pai, Richard Salkeld, tinha 78 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Crofton, tinha 63 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Rosgill em 1362, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1388, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em abril de 1379, em Addingham, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Addingham, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Salkeld родился в 1340 г., его отцу по имени Richard Salkeld было 78 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Crofton, 63. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Rosgill в 1362 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1388 году он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер апрель 1379 г. в местности аддингхам, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности аддингхам, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Salkeld nació en 1340, su papá, Richard Salkeld, tenía 78 años y su mamá, Matilda Crofton, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Christiana Rosgill en 1362, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1388, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió en abril de 1379, en Addingham, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Addingham, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
